name: Hamburger Boat
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the center of the bread to create a boat shape.
2. Brown the ground beef in a pan.
3. Add the tomato sauce, mushrooms, and onion to the pan. Simmer for 2-3 minutes.
4. Pour the beef mixture into the hollowed-out bread.
5. Top with slices of mozzarella cheese.
6. Place on a baking sheet and heat at 350°F for 10-15 minutes, or until the cheese melts.
7. Slice and serve. Serves 5-6.
